rules.name: bank_credit_card
rules.notes: Bank type account with credit card name -> current payable

rules.name: bank_petty_cash
rules.notes: Bank type + petty cash -> cash flow asset (per SystemMappings.csv)

rules.name: bank_cc_abbreviation
rules.notes: Bank account with 'CC' abbreviation (credit card) -> current payable.

rules.name: bank_default
rules.notes: Bank type account without credit card name -> bank account asset

rules.name: liability_credit_card
rules.notes: Credit card name on a liability account -> current payable

rules.name: owner_drawings_company
rules.notes: Owner keyword + 'drawings' on Company template -> liability drawings

rules.name: owner_drawings
rules.notes: Owner keyword + 'drawings' -> equity drawings (non-company fallback)

rules.name: owner_funds_introduced_company
rules.notes: Owner keyword + capital/funds + Company template -> NCL advance

rules.name: owner_funds_introduced_other
rules.notes: Owner keyword + capital/funds + non-Company template -> equity advance.

rules.name: gross_receipts
rules.notes: Gross receipts for revenue types -> trading services

rules.name: covid_grant
rules.notes: Covid-related grants -> non-assessable income.

rules.name: jobkeeper
rules.notes: Government wage subsidies -> government grants

rules.name: cash_flow_boost
rules.notes: Government cash flow boost -> non-assessable income

rules.name: government_grant
rules.notes: Government grants/subsidies on revenue types.

rules.name: reimbursement_income
rules.notes: Reimbursements received -> other income

rules.name: workers_comp_recovery
rules.notes: Workers comp recoveries -> other income

rules.name: fbt_reimbursement
rules.notes: FBT reimbursements/employee contributions -> other income.

rules.name: small_business_restructure_gain
rules.notes: Gain on small business restructure -> other income.

rules.name: sale_of_asset_gain
keywords: profit loss on sale of fixed asset
rules.notes: Profit/loss on sale of fixed asset -> other gains (not on expense type)

rules.name: sale_proceeds
rules.notes: Investment sale proceeds -> other investment income

rules.name: product_income
rules.notes: Product income/sales of product -> trading goods revenue

rules.name: rental_income
rules.notes: Rental income -> investment rental income.

rules.name: commission_income
rules.notes: Commission income -> other income commissions.

rules.name: surcharge_income
rules.notes: Surcharge income on Other Income type -> other income.

rules.name: rebates_refunds_income
rules.notes: Rebates/refunds on income type -> other income.

rules.name: deposit_income
rules.notes: Deposit income -> other income.

rules.name: sale_of_business
rules.notes: Sale of business -> gain on disposal of investments.

rules.name: wages_direct_cost
rules.notes: Wages/salary under direct costs type -> COGS.

rules.name: wages_expense
rules.notes: Wages/salary under expense type -> employee wages.

rules.name: super_direct_cost
rules.notes: Superannuation under direct costs -> COGS

rules.name: super_expense
rules.notes: Superannuation under expense -> employee super

rules.name: super_payable
rules.notes: Superannuation payable -> employee payables liability

rules.name: super_payable_by_type
rules.notes: Superannuation under current liability type -> employee payables

rules.name: wages_payable
rules.notes: Wages payable/PAYGW -> employee payables liability.

rules.name: payroll_payable
rules.notes: Payroll payable -> employee payables liability

rules.name: payg_instalment
rules.notes: PAYG instalment / PAYGI (PAYG Income Tax Instalments) -> income tax liability.

rules.name: payg_withholding_payable
rules.notes: PAYG Withholdings Payable -> employee payables.

rules.name: payroll_clearing
rules.notes: Payroll clearing accounts represent employee entitlements

rules.name: leave_payable
rules.notes: Leave payable (annual, long service, Q leave, TOIL) is employee entitlement

rules.name: employee_provision
rules.notes: Provisions for employee-related items are employee entitlements

rules.name: payroll_tax_payable
rules.notes: Payroll tax payable is a tax liability, NOT an employee entitlement.

rules.name: payroll_tax_expense
rules.notes: Payroll tax expense correlates with employee remuneration but is not

rules.name: sgc_payable
rules.notes: SGC (Superannuation Guarantee Charge) -> tax liability.

rules.name: sge_employer_payable
rules.notes: SGE (Super Guarantee Employer) -> employee payables liability.

rules.name: green_slip
rules.notes: Green slip (CTP insurance) -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: mv_fuel
rules.notes: MV fuel -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: motor_vehicle_fuel
rules.notes: Motor vehicle fuel -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: vehicle_fuel
rules.notes: Vehicle fuel -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: mv_interest
rules.notes: MV interest -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: motor_vehicle_interest
rules.notes: Motor vehicle interest -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: vehicle_interest
rules.notes: Vehicle interest -> vehicle expenses (excludes UEI)

rules.name: motor_vehicle_insurance
rules.notes: Motor vehicle insurance -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: vehicle_insurance
rules.notes: Vehicle insurance -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: mv_insurance
rules.notes: MV insurance -> vehicle expenses.

rules.name: registration_insurance
rules.notes: Registration and insurance -> vehicle expenses.

rules.name: vehicle_rego
rules.notes: Vehicle registration -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: motor_vehicle_rego
rules.notes: Motor vehicle registration -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: mv_expenses
rules.notes: MV expenses (excluding depreciation) -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: motor_vehicle_expenses
rules.notes: Motor vehicle expenses -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: trailer_expense
rules.notes: Trailer expenses -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: director_loan_to_ca
rules.notes: Loan TO director on current asset -> current director loan.

rules.name: director_loan_to
rules.notes: Loan TO director (fallback) -> non-current director loan asset

rules.name: director_loan_generic_nca
rules.notes: Director loan on liability type -> reclassify as NCA director loan.

rules.name: director_loan_generic_ca
rules.notes: Director loan on current asset type -> current director loan.

rules.name: div7a_loan_nca
rules.notes: Division 7A loan -> non-current director loan asset.

rules.name: div7a_loan_ca
rules.notes: Division 7A loan on current asset type -> current director loan.

rules.name: directors_loan_from
rules.notes: Director's loan (FROM director) -> non-current loan liability.

rules.name: loan_to_pty
rules.notes: Audit fix: Loan + pty on ASSET type -> related party asset.

rules.name: loan_from_pty
rules.notes: Audit fix: Loan + pty on LIABILITY type -> related party liability

rules.name: upe_asset
rules.notes: UPE (Unpaid Present Entitlement) -> current related party receivable.

rules.name: trust_distribution_receivable
rules.notes: Trust distribution receivable -> related party current asset.

rules.name: unsecured_related_loan
rules.notes: Unsecured loans on liability type -> current related party liability.

rules.name: related_party_nca
rules.notes: Explicit 'related party' on NCA type -> related party NCA.

rules.name: related_party_ca
rules.notes: Explicit 'related party' on current asset type -> related party CA.

rules.name: vehicle_loan
rules.notes: Vehicle loan -> hire purchase liability (non-current)

rules.name: hp_interest_expense
rules.notes: HP/chattel mortgage on expense type -> interest expense

rules.name: hp_uei_current
rules.notes: HP + interest/int abbreviation on current liability -> current UEI.

rules.name: hp_current
rules.notes: Hire purchase on current liability -> current HPA.

rules.name: hp_non_current
rules.notes: Hire purchase on non-current/generic liability -> non-current HPA

rules.name: hp_fallback
rules.notes: Hire purchase fallback -> non-current HPA (excludes expense type)

rules.name: chattel_mortgage
rules.notes: Chattel mortgage -> non-current chattel mortgage.

rules.name: chattel_mortgage_uei
rules.notes: Chattel mortgage + unexpired interest -> chattel mortgage UEI.

rules.name: uei_non_current
rules.notes: Unexpired interest -> non-current UEI (HP fallback).

rules.name: premium_funding
rules.notes: Premium funding (insurance financing) -> unsecured current loan

rules.name: generic_loan_ncl
rules.notes: Generic loan on non-current liability -> non-current loan

rules.name: generic_loan_cl
rules.notes: Generic loan on current/generic liability -> non-current loan

rules.name: generic_loan_nca
rules.notes: Generic loan on non-current asset -> NCA loan.

rules.name: generic_loan_ca
rules.notes: Generic loan on current asset -> related party CA

rules.name: vehicle_make_finance_liability
rules.notes: Vehicle make + finance -> hire purchase liability

rules.name: vehicle_make_loan_liability
rules.notes: Vehicle make + loan -> hire purchase liability.

rules.name: vehicle_make_only_liability
rules.notes: Vehicle make on liability (no 'loan'/'finance' keyword required) -> hire purchase.

rules.name: lender_liability
rules.notes: Recognised Australian lender name -> loan liability.

rules.name: gst_liability
rules.notes: GST (not on expense accounts, not fees, not prepaid) -> GST tax liability

rules.name: bas_payable
rules.notes: BAS payable -> tax liability

rules.name: bas_clearing
rules.notes: BAS clearing account -> tax liability

rules.name: fbt_expense
rules.notes: Fringe benefit tax expense -> EXP.FBT. SystemMappings leaf code.

rules.name: income_tax_expense
rules.notes: Income tax expense -> EXP.INC. SystemMappings leaf code.

rules.name: accrued_income_liability
rules.notes: Accrued income on liability type -> deferred income

rules.name: deferred_income
rules.notes: Deferred/unearned income -> LIA.CUR.DEF. SystemMappings leaf code.

rules.name: ato_integrated_account
rules.notes: ATO ICA is a mixed tax account (PAYG, GST, FTC) — assign to tax parent.

rules.name: income_tax_instalments
rules.notes: Income tax instalments -> income tax liability.

rules.name: ato_payable_ica
rules.notes: ATO payable / ICA -> tax liability.

rules.name: ato_income_tax_liability
rules.notes: ATO income tax / income tax account -> income tax liability.

rules.name: unlodged_bas
rules.notes: Unlodged BAS -> tax liability.

rules.name: directors_fees_expense
rules.notes: Directors/trustee fees -> general expense. SystemMappings

rules.name: closing_stock
rules.notes: Closing stock/materials -> cost of sales closing.

rules.name: materials_purchase
rules.notes: Materials/building materials -> cost of purchases (excludes closing stock)

rules.name: borrowing_expense_interest
rules.notes: Borrowing expenses/costs on expense account -> interest expense.

rules.name: amortisation
rules.notes: Amortisation expense

rules.name: subcontractor_direct
rules.notes: Subcontractor under direct costs -> COGS

rules.name: subcontractor_expense
rules.notes: Subcontractor under expense type -> operating expense (production-related).

rules.name: contractor_expense
rules.notes: Contractor payments -> operating expense. Subcontractors handled by subcontractor_expense.

rules.name: labour_hire_direct
rules.notes: Labour hire under direct costs -> COGS

rules.name: training_education
rules.notes: Training/education/conference -> employee expenses

rules.name: uniforms_clothing
rules.notes: Uniforms/clothing -> employee expenses

rules.name: employee_reimbursement
rules.notes: Employee reimbursement expense -> EXP.EMP.

rules.name: car_hire_expense
rules.notes: Car hire -> vehicle expenses

rules.name: equipment_hire_direct
rules.notes: Equipment/plant hire under direct costs -> COGS.

rules.name: equipment_hire_expense
rules.notes: Equipment hire under expense -> general expense (excludes car hire)

rules.name: home_warranty
rules.notes: Home warranty insurance -> cost of sales (construction)

rules.name: tools_misc_direct
rules.notes: Tools and miscellaneous under direct costs -> COGS purchases

rules.name: donations
rules.notes: Donations/charity -> general expense

rules.name: advertising
rules.notes: Advertising/marketing/sponsorship -> advertising expense.

rules.name: branding
rules.notes: Branding/rebranding -> advertising expense

rules.name: gifts
rules.notes: Gifts/donations -> general expense (not advertising)

rules.name: professional_fees
rules.notes: Professional fees: accounting, accountancy, bookkeeping, consulting, legal.

rules.name: audit_fees
rules.notes: Audit fees/remuneration -> audit expense

rules.name: workers_comp_insurance
rules.notes: Workers comp + insurance -> employee expenses

rules.name: car_insurance
rules.notes: Car insurance -> vehicle expense (not general insurance).

rules.name: general_insurance
rules.notes: General insurance -> insurance expense

rules.name: phone_internet
rules.notes: Phone/mobile/internet -> utilities

rules.name: power_heating
rules.notes: Light/power/electricity/gas -> utilities.

rules.name: filing_fees
rules.notes: Filing fees (ASIC regulatory fee) -> admin expense.

rules.name: subscription_expense
rules.notes: Subscriptions and dues -> administrative expense.

rules.name: formation_expense
rules.notes: Formation/incorporation expenses -> amortisation expense (EXP.AMO).

rules.name: office_admin
rules.notes: Office expenses/printing/stationery/postage -> admin

rules.name: council_rates
rules.notes: Council rates/fees -> occupancy

rules.name: staff_amenities
rules.notes: Staff amenities -> employee expenses.

rules.name: staff_training
rules.notes: Staff training -> employee expenses

rules.name: bank_fees
rules.notes: Bank name + fee -> general expense

rules.name: merchant_fees
rules.notes: Merchant fees -> general expense

rules.name: cleaning
rules.notes: Cleaning/laundry/cleaner -> occupancy expense (excludes vehicle washing)

rules.name: depreciation_expense
rules.notes: Depreciation expense (excludes accumulated dep)

rules.name: travel_international
rules.notes: International travel -> international travel expense

rules.name: travel_domestic
rules.notes: Domestic travel/accommodation (not international) -> national travel.

rules.name: work_safety
rules.notes: Work safety -> employee expenses

rules.name: long_service_leave
rules.notes: Long service leave expense -> employee expenses.

rules.name: qleave_expense
rules.notes: QLeave (Queensland Long Service Leave) -> employee expenses.

rules.name: client_gift_advertising
rules.notes: Client gifts -> advertising/marketing.

rules.name: lead_generation_advertising
rules.notes: Lead generation -> advertising/marketing expense.

rules.name: graphic_design_advertising
rules.notes: Graphic design -> advertising/marketing expense.

rules.name: recruitment_employee
rules.notes: Recruitment costs -> employee expenses.

rules.name: fines_penalties
rules.notes: Fines/penalties -> non-deductible expense

rules.name: cost_of_sales_name
rules.notes: Cost of Sales in name -> COGS. Per user decision: type=Direct Costs

rules.name: cos_abbreviation
rules.notes: COS abbreviation after dash on direct costs type -> COGS.

rules.name: cost_of_goods_sold
rules.notes: Cost of goods sold -> COGS (catch-all)

rules.name: cost_of_sales_type
rules.notes: Cost of sales type catch-all -> COGS

rules.name: rent_expense
rules.notes: Rent expense. Uses ' rent' (leading space) to avoid false positives on

rules.name: tax_adjustment_expense
rules.notes: Tax adjustment expense is an extraordinary item — journal to reconcile

rules.name: ato_interest_expense
rules.notes: ATO interest charges -> interest expense.

rules.name: interest_expense
rules.notes: Interest expense -> interest expense

rules.name: client_entertainment
rules.notes: Client meetings/meals -> entertainment

rules.name: entertainment_non_deductible
rules.notes: Entertainment + non-deductible -> non-deductible entertainment

rules.name: entertainment_default
rules.notes: Entertainment (generic) -> non-deductible by default.

rules.name: doubtful_debt_provision
rules.notes: Provision for doubtful debts -> EXP.BAD.DOU. SystemMappings

rules.name: bad_debts
rules.notes: Bad debt expense

rules.name: operating_expense
rules.notes: Operating expenses -> EXP.OPR. SystemMappings leaf code for

rules.name: bank_charges
rules.notes: Generic bank fees/charges -> general expense.

rules.name: consultancy_fees
rules.notes: Consultancy/consultant -> professional fees.

rules.name: management_fees
rules.notes: Management fees -> professional fees.

rules.name: collection_expense
rules.notes: Collection/debt recovery costs -> professional fees.

rules.name: delivery_freight
rules.notes: Delivery/freight/cartage -> cost of sales.

rules.name: discount_allowed
rules.notes: Discount allowed -> cost of sales (customer discounts reduce revenue).

rules.name: instant_asset_writeoff
rules.notes: Instant asset write-off -> depreciation expense.

rules.name: asset_woff_writeoff
rules.notes: Asset + write-off abbreviation -> depreciation expense.

rules.name: leasing_expense
rules.notes: Leasing charges/payments -> operating lease payments.

rules.name: license_permit_expense
rules.notes: Licences/permits on expense -> administrative expense.

rules.name: employment_expense_other
rules.notes: Other/general employment expense -> employment costs.

rules.name: security_expense
rules.notes: Security costs -> occupancy expense.

rules.name: storage_expense
rules.notes: Storage fees -> rental/lease. Renting storage space is a lease expense.

rules.name: tool_replacement
rules.notes: Tool replacements -> repairs & maintenance.

rules.name: water_sewerage
rules.notes: Water/sewerage -> utilities. SystemMappings EXP.UTI includes 'Water'.

rules.name: ato_administration_fee
rules.notes: ATO administration fee -> non-deductible expense.

rules.name: administration_fee
rules.notes: Administration fees -> administrative expense.

rules.name: data_processing_expense
rules.notes: Data processing charges -> administrative expense.

rules.name: magazines_periodicals
rules.notes: Magazines/periodicals -> administrative expense.

rules.name: parking_expense
rules.notes: Parking -> vehicle expense.

rules.name: dividends_equity
rules.notes: Dividend on equity type -> ordinary dividends from retained earnings.

rules.name: dividend_payable_expense
rules.notes: Dividend paid/payable on expense -> dividend expense

rules.name: dividend_payable_by_keyword
rules.notes: Dividend + payable on expense -> dividend expense

rules.name: stock_movement_expense
rules.notes: Stock movement/adjustment -> cost of sales.

rules.name: cogs_prefix
rules.notes: COGS / cost of goods (not 'cost of goods sold') -> cost of sales.

rules.name: cost_of_goods_sold_specific
rules.notes: Cost of goods sold (specific) -> purchases.

rules.name: shareholder_salaries
rules.notes: Shareholder salaries/wages -> shareholder salaries.

rules.name: bank_revaluation_forex
rules.notes: Bank/currency revaluations and forex gains/losses -> EXP.FOR.

rules.name: forex_other_income
rules.notes: Forex gains/losses on income-typed accounts -> other income.

rules.name: share_capital_equity
rules.notes: Share capital on equity -> ordinary shares.

rules.name: ordinary_shares
rules.notes: Ordinary shares -> equity shares

rules.name: paid_up_capital
rules.notes: Issued/paid up capital -> equity ordinary shares

rules.name: fully_part_paid_shares
rules.notes: Fully/partly paid shares -> ordinary share capital.

rules.name: issued_paid_capital
rules.notes: Issued and paid capital -> equity ordinary shares

rules.name: shares_asset
rules.notes: Shares on asset accounts -> investment shares

rules.name: retained_earnings_type
rules.notes: Retained Earnings type -> equity retained earnings

rules.name: retained_earnings_keyword
rules.notes: 'Retained' + 'profit' or 'earnings' -> equity retained earnings.

rules.name: accumulated_losses
rules.notes: Accumulated losses -> equity retained earnings

rules.name: asset_revaluation_reserve
rules.notes: Asset revaluation reserve -> equity revaluation reserve.

rules.name: small_business_restructuring_reserve
rules.notes: Small Business Restructuring fund -> general reserves.

rules.name: historical_adjustment_equity
rules.notes: Historical adjustments relate to prior-year adjustments and represent

rules.name: tax_adjustment_reserve
rules.notes: Tax adjustment reserve impacts retained earnings. The journal reconciling

rules.name: opening_balance_equity
rules.notes: Opening balance equity -> retained earnings. SystemMappings

rules.name: cash_on_hand
rules.notes: Cash/petty cash/undeposited funds -> cash flow asset.

rules.name: rental_bonds_held
rules.notes: Rental bonds HELD -> current payable liability.

rules.name: sundry_debtors
rules.notes: Sundry debtors/debtor -> current receivables (not trade).

rules.name: retentions_receivable
rules.notes: Retentions receivable -> current receivables

rules.name: retention_debtor
rules.notes: Retention + receivable/debtor -> current receivables

rules.name: trade_creditors
rules.notes: Trade creditors/payables -> trade payables

rules.name: sundry_creditors
rules.notes: Sundry creditors -> payables (not trade).

rules.name: fees_payable
rules.notes: 'Fees Payable' (e.g. Accounting Fees Payable) -> current payable.

rules.name: other_creditors
rules.notes: 'Other Creditors' -> current payable.

rules.name: furniture_fittings_asset
rules.notes: Furniture & fittings -> plant & equipment fixed assets.

rules.name: ppe_asset
rules.notes: Property, Plant & Equipment -> fixed assets plant.

rules.name: motor_vehicle_fixed_asset
rules.notes: Motor vehicle fixed assets -> vehicle assets.

rules.name: inventory_asset
rules.notes: 'Inventory' name on Current Asset or Inventory type -> ASS.CUR.INY. Synonym pair with stock_on_hand; covers Xero charts where 'Inventory' is typed Current Asset rather than Inventory.

rules.name: preliminary_expenses
rules.notes: Preliminary expenses -> non-current asset

rules.name: term_deposit_nca
rules.notes: Term deposit on non-current asset -> ASS.NCA.INV.TER.

rules.name: term_deposit_ca
rules.notes: Term deposit on current asset -> ASS.CUR.TER.

rules.name: intangible_asset_keywords
rules.notes: Intangible asset keywords -> ASS.NCA.INT. SystemMappings

rules.name: prepaid_asset
rules.notes: Prepaid/prepayment -> current prepaid receivable.

rules.name: wipaa_cost
rules.notes: WIPAA under P&L types -> cost of sales

rules.name: wipaa_asset
rules.notes: WIPAA on balance sheet -> WIP inventory asset.

rules.name: stock_on_hand
rules.notes: Stock on hand -> inventory asset.

rules.name: stock_asset_general
rules.notes: General 'stock' on asset type -> inventory.

rules.name: formation_costs_asset
rules.notes: Formation/incorporation/establishment costs on NCA -> intangibles.

rules.name: formation_costs_written_off
rules.notes: 'Formation Costs - Less Written Off' -> accumulated amortisation of intangibles

rules.name: general_pool_asset
rules.notes: General pool / SBE pool -> fixed assets.

rules.name: investment_asset_generic
rules.notes: Generic 'investment' on NCA type -> financial assets.

rules.name: goodwill_asset
rules.notes: Goodwill -> intangible goodwill.

rules.name: construction_revenue_services
rules.notes: Construction: all revenue is trading services.

rules.name: construction_subcontractors_cos
rules.notes: Construction: subcontractors are cost of sales.

rules.name: construction_materials_cos
rules.notes: Construction: materials/supplies are purchases (cost of sales).

rules.name: auto_mv_expenses_cos
rules.notes: Auto dealers: MV expenses are cost of sales, not overhead.

rules.name: auto_sales_goods
rules.notes: Auto dealers: sales/consignment revenue is sale of goods (vehicles).

rules.name: auto_service_revenue
rules.notes: Auto dealers: warranty/delivery/service items are trading services.

rules.name: auto_consignment_fees_commission
rules.notes: Auto dealers: consignment fees received are commission income.

rules.name: auto_car_rental_revenue
rules.notes: Auto dealers: car rentals are trading services, not investment rental.

rules.name: auto_transport_towing_cos
rules.notes: Auto dealers: transport & towing is cost of sales (getting cars to lot).
